sections.paragraph:
ὀλιγόπιστος, ον (s. prec. entry; Sextus 6; elsewh. only in Christian wr. e.g. AcThom 28 [Aa II 2 p. 145]) of little faith/trust, in our lit., in the NT only in the synoptics and only in addressing the disciples Mt 6:30; 8:26; 16:8; Lk 12:28; Peter alone Mt 14:31.—To the Christians in Corinth AcPlCor 2:31.—TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

Sextus Sextus , end of II a.d.—List 5

  1. wr. = writers, writings

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

AcThom AcThom = Acts of Thomas—List 5

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

NT NT = New Testament

AcPlCor AcPlCor = Acts of Paul: correspondence with Corinthians (a.k.a. Third Corinthians), text according to PBodmer X—List 1

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 702
